next_valid_move: Run each role prompt through separate ChatGPT modes/agents, attach web source notes where needed, record simulated findings, fix P0/P1 items, rerun proof, and keep qualified approval gates closed unless real reviewer evidence is later added.
proof_boundary: AI-assisted reviews are useful solo-developer risk discovery. They are not qualified external approvals and cannot open launch, legal, customs, security, privacy, freight, or payment gates by themselves.
